events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in gray clothes and a gray hat and a man in a gray hat with stripes and a green coat walked towards the building.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 9.9s, a man in gray clothes and a gray hat and a man in a gray hat with stripes and a green coat walked towards the building.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; As he approached the door, the man in gray looked at the green coat and backed away.
events.event_text: From 3.0s to 4.9s, as he approached the door, the man in gray looked at the green coat and backed away.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; The green coat turned his head and looked at the man in gray before raising the spray bottle in his hand and pointing it at the wall.
events.event_text: From 3.0s to 9.9s, the green coat turned his head and looked at the man in gray before raising the spray bottle in his hand and pointing it at the wall.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The green jacket puts one hand in his pocket and the other holds a spray bottle and spray paint on the wall, slowly moving to one side.
events.event_text: From 9.9s to 17.7s, the green jacket puts one hand in his pocket and the other holds a spray bottle and spray paint on the wall, slowly moving to one side.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; The green coat turned and left towards the road. He looked back when he was almost on the road.
events.event_text: From 17.7s to 23.5s, the green coat turned and left towards the road. He looked back when he was almost on the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in the green coat and the man in gray left along the road.
events.event_text: From 28.1s to 38.8s, the man in the green coat and the man in gray left along the road.
